info.title: Salus API
info.description: API documentation for the Salus health assistant application.

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns a Sanctum token.

items.example: The email has already been taken.

post.description: Authenticates a user and returns a Sanctum token.
Revokes the current Sanctum access token.

get.description: Returns the currently authenticated user profile.

description.example: Throbbing pain on the left side.
Throbbing pain on the left side.
Throbbing pain on the left side.
Throbbing pain on the left side.

get.summary: Search doctors by specialty or city

post.description: Generates general wellness advice based on the authenticated user's recent symptoms.

additional_context.example: I have also been feeling tired for two days.

advice.example: Stay hydrated, rest well, and monitor your symptoms. If they worsen, contact a doctor.

message.example: No symptoms found for this user.
Unable to generate health advice at the moment.

advice.example: Stay hydrated, rest well, and monitor your symptoms.

sanctum.description: Use a Sanctum bearer token. Example: Bearer 1|abcdef...
